title: tragacantha paraplesia
intro: Tragacantha paraplesia, also known as the lesser burnet, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Tragacantha paraplesia are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
